case_title: CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. MELECIO MAGDALUYO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAGDALUYO, MELECIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.99) SERVED JUN-02-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAGDALUYO, MELECIO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
